_meta.purpose: Provenanced OUTCOME evidence for resolving the pre-committed corridor calibration points in data/calibration-ledger.json. Keyed by target zone. This file records what HAPPENED (did a new lab-confirmed BDBV case appear in the target zone within a point's [pinned_at, resolves_at] window) and is read by calibration_resolver.py. It is deliberately separate from the model snapshot (data/live-bdbv-2026-output.json): Uganda targets are resolved from Uganda MoH / WHO / Africa CDC surveillance, DRC targets from promoted DRC MoH zone-attributed counts. This file never alters the immutable ledger.
doctrine: Importation counts. The corridor predictions are importation/spillover predictions ('a case APPEARS in the target'), so an imported or travel-linked case confirmed in the target zone satisfies the criterion (Kraemer 2019; Klamser 2023).

In-window only. Only a confirmation dated within [pinned_at, resolves_at] resolves a point YES. Pre-window cases (e.g. the 15-16 May Kampala imports) do not count; calibration_resolver.py re-checks the date against each point's window.
Missing entry != NO. A target with no entry here is scored unscoreable_no_feed, never resolved_no.
Provenance required. Every entry cites a source_id and source_url; classification records whether the evidence is resolution-eligible.
_meta.licensing: CC BY 4.0 (per LICENSES.md) covers this file's schema, structure, and authored annotations.
_meta.retrieval_note: Uganda evidence rechecked 2026-06-20 via the Uganda MoH EVD dashboard API (https://evd-daily.health.go.ug/api/stats): cumulative cases remained 19 with zero new daily cases on 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, and 2026-06-20. DRC target evidence is refreshed from reviewed INSP SitRep promotions through SitRep #035; Beni first appears in the reviewed SitRep #019 promotion dated 2026-06-02.

evidence.primary_publisher: Uganda Ministry of Health (announcement, 2026-05-23, as reported)
evidence.pre_window_cases: Two imported Kampala cases confirmed 15 + 16 May 2026 (WHO DON602) are PRE-window and excluded.
evidence.note: On 2026-05-23 Uganda announced 3 new confirmed cases (total 5): the driver who transported the first patient, a health worker, and a woman who travelled DRC->Arua->Entebbe and tested positive at a private hospital in Kampala. >=1 new lab-confirmed case appeared in Kampala within the 20 May-19 June window.

No lab-confirmed case reported in Bundibugyo District (Uganda) through the 2026-06-20 Uganda MoH dashboard/API recheck; cumulative Uganda cases remained 19 and daily API rows for 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, and 2026-06-20 reported zero cases.

No lab-confirmed case reported in Kasese District (Uganda) through the 2026-06-20 Uganda MoH dashboard/API recheck; cumulative Uganda cases remained 19 and daily API rows for 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, and 2026-06-20 reported zero cases.

evidence.primary_publisher: DRC Ministry of Public Health / INSP / INRB
evidence.note: Reviewed SitRep #019 promotion dated 2026-06-02 includes Beni with 5 confirmed / 3 confirmed deaths, satisfying Beni-target calibration points inside their 20/21 May to 19/20 June windows. SitRep #035 continues to list Beni with 16 confirmed / 12 confirmed deaths.

No lab-confirmed case reported in Arua (Uganda) through the 2026-06-20 Uganda MoH dashboard/API recheck; cumulative Uganda cases remained 19 and daily API rows for 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, and 2026-06-20 reported zero cases.

No lab-confirmed case reported in Nebbi District (Uganda) through the 2026-06-20 Uganda MoH dashboard/API recheck; cumulative Uganda cases remained 19 and daily API rows for 2026-06-18, 2026-06-19, and 2026-06-20 reported zero cases.
